contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 120
- Description: Edgar migration Cypher→autopilot + Currency Conversion deployed end-to-end
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1051
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/276
  
  Details:
  Followed up on the merged Currency Conversion PRs (dapp #225 #226, tokenomics #274 #275, sentiment_importer #1050) by getting the whole stack actually running in production.
  
  AWS / infra (TRUESIGHT_DAO_AUTOPILOT account 440626669078):
  - Diagnosed: original Cypher-account seni_ror reachable on AWS API but TCP 22 timing out from Gary's network; seni_sk stopped. Postgres + Redis still reachable.
  - Cross-account AMI replication: shared seni_ror_20250915 + seni_sk_20250630 AMIs (and underlying snapshots) from Cypher → autopilot, then copy-image into autopilot so it owns standalone copies.
  - Imported NELANCO_aws_20201122 public key into autopilot so the local PEM keeps working without changes.
  - Created edgar-2026-05-10 SG (sg-093be54e48c6478e8) with 22/80/443/3002 inbound; later added 2812 restricted to operator IP for monit web UI.
  - Launched seni_ror_2026 (i-0ac8462aa6bb54986, 3.90.179.151) and seni_sk_2026 (i-0bb43299c84c5ccd5, 54.163.216.235) in us-east-1d.
  - Stripped stale ExecStartPre lines (yarn install / bin/webpack — referenced files that don't exist in current master) from the AMI-baked seni_ror systemd unit.
  - Stopped/disabled apache2 (was bound to port 80 from the AMI baseline), installed nginx + python3-certbot-dns-route53.
  - Issued Let's Encrypt cert for edgar.truesight.me via Route53 DNS-01 challenge using the autopilot AWS creds; configured nginx to terminate TLS and proxy to localhost:3002.
  - Flipped Route53 A record edgar.truesight.me 54.226.114.186 (krake_nginx, Cypher) → 3.90.179.151 (autopilot seni_ror), TTL 60s, INSYNC, end-to-end HTTP 401 confirmed.
  - Local ~/.ssh/config: added seni_ror_new / seni_sk_new aliases for the autopilot hosts; preserved bare seni_ror / seni_sk pointing at original Cypher IPs for forensic SSH access.
  - sentiment_importer/deploy.sh + scripts/setup_logrotate.sh updated to use SSH_ROR / SSH_SK env vars defaulting to the *_new aliases (PR #1051 merged).
  - monit was already installed on both AMIs; just opened port 2812 in the SG (restricted to operator IP) — monit web UIs accessible at http://3.90.179.151:2812 / http://54.163.216.235:2812 (auth prod:prod — flagged as weak password follow-up).
  
  GAS deployment (Apps Script project 1orWgdGckts...UfJ0JZC5J, same project as capital_injection_processing.gs):
  - Pushed CurrencyConversion.js via clasp push from tokenomics/clasp_mirrors/.
  - Updated appsscript.json manifest to add a webapp block (executeAs USER_DEPLOYING, access ANYONE_ANONYMOUS) and oauthScopes array (spreadsheets, script.external_request, script.scriptapp).
  - clasp deploy as Web App; final stable deployment ID AKfycby8bOb0iEfJh-Io90fK-NQRpC6BlLC66e6MCr3JvyOEi-UDH-TkwYSsdeXKuhkpsU4 (used clasp deploy -i <id> for in-place updates so the URL Edgar uses stays stable across iterations); cleaned up 3 stale intermediate deployments via clasp undeploy.
  - Renamed installTimeTrigger_ → installTimeTrigger and listTriggers_ → listTriggers because Apps Script hides trailing-underscore 'private' functions from the editor's Run dropdown — found this empirically when Gary couldn't see them.
  - Gary ran installTimeTrigger() once from the editor (granted the script.scriptapp OAuth scope); confirmed via ?action=listTriggers that the 10-min cron is live alongside the existing parseAndProcessCapitalInjectionLogs trigger.
  
  Sheets API:
  - Created the Currency Conversion intake tab on 1qbZZhf-...zASQ (gid 1286252879) via Google Sheets API using market_research/google_credentials.json (the tokenomics-schema SA had only read access on this sheet). 15-column header A-O matching the schema, header bolded with grey background.
  
  Edgar wiring:
  - Set CURRENCY_CONVERSION_WEBHOOK_URL to the GAS /exec URL on seni_ror_new via systemd drop-in /etc/systemd/system/seni_ror.service.d/override.conf (so the AMI-baked unit doesn't lose it on next pull); daemon-reload + restart; verified with sudo systemctl show.
  
  Doc sync:
  - tokenomics PR #276 merged: pulled the trigger helpers + manifest scopes back into the canonical google_app_scripts/tdg_asset_management/currency_conversion_processing.gs and rewrote CURRENCY_CONVERSION_IMPLEMENTATION.md to reflect what was actually done (sheet via Sheets API, clasp push, in-place deployment updates, systemd drop-in, manifest contents). All previously-pending operator steps now marked Done 2026-05-10.
  
  Net state: end-to-end pipeline is operational. Submissions from dapp/currency_conversion.html → Edgar /dao/submit_contribution (HTTPS via autopilot) → Telegram Chat Logs → both immediate trigger via Edgar Sidekiq webhook AND 10-min cron via Apps Script time trigger → Currency Conversion intake → managed AGL ledger Transactions tab (signed -source / +target double entry, Entity = Warehouse Manager). One operator follow-up remaining: actual smoke test from dapp/currency_conversion.html against a real managed ledger.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 200.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
